name: Infrastructure Lease
description: Detects the leasing of infrastructure, which may be an early indicator of malicious activities.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the infrastructure lease event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account or service principal that initiated the infrastructure lease.

parameters.name: cloud_provider
parameters.description: The cloud service provider (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) where the infrastructure was leased.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: The geographical region where the cloud infrastructure was provisioned.

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: The identifier of the leased cloud resource (e.g., instance ID, server ID).
